subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the Call of God, the Lord of Eternity, from the precincts of His Most Great Prison. By My life! Should one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد ان استمع ندآء الله مالک القدم من شطر سجنه الاعظم لعمری لو یفوز من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
